items.name: yashkhatri45/Meccha-Chameleon-Trainer-Mod-Overlay
items.full_text: Windows external trainer for MECCHA CHAMELEON on Steam — auto camo, unlimited paint, god mode hider, seeker vision, pose lock, no-clip, and overlay controls for 2–10 player hide-and-seek lobbies.

items.name: SteelProductionPivot/MECCHA-CHAMELEON-VISION
items.full_text: 🦎 Meccha-Vision – visual enhancement tool for MECCHA CHAMELEON with ESP wallhack, aimbot, fly hack, teleport, god mode, and more. Dominate the hide-and-seek battlefield!

items.name: xuanxuan321/xuanxuan-prompts
items.full_text: AI Agent 复刻精美网页的提示词合集：每个目录一份 prompt.md + 效果图截图，丢给 Claude/Codex/Kimi 即可生成对应网站

items.name: Praxis-Society/praxis-cloak
items.full_text: On-device PII scrub + rehydration for cloud LLMs — chat with Claude/GPT while a local model swaps your PII out before the prompt is sent, then maps the answer back to your real entities. Built with Qwen.
